content.problemStatement:
Read problems statements in Russian.You are given an array AAA of NNN positive integers. You are allowed to perform any of the following operations any number of times:


Pick an index iii (1в‰¤iв‰¤n1 \le i \le n1в‰¤iв‰¤n), and a prime number ppp. Assign AiГ—pA_i \times pAiвЂ‹Г—p to AiA_iAiвЂ‹.
Pick an index iii (1в‰¤iв‰¤n1 \le i \le n1в‰¤iв‰¤n), and a prime number ppp such that AiA_iAiвЂ‹ is divisible by ppp. Assign AiГ·pA_i \div pAiвЂ‹Г·p to aia_iaiвЂ‹.
The goal is to make all the numbers in array equal using the minimum number of operations. Among all sequences of operations using the minimum number of operations, denote SSS to be the **smallest** final value of all elements in AAA. You are given QQQ queries of the form (Li,Ri)(L_{i}, R_{i})(LiвЂ‹,RiвЂ‹). For each query, you need to calculate the SSS value of the contiguous subarray ALiвЂ¦RiA_{L_i \ldots R_i}ALiвЂ‹вЂ¦RiвЂ‹вЂ‹.


Input Format

The first line contains NNN and QQQ denoting the number of elements in the array and number of queries.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,вЂ¦,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1вЂ‹,A2вЂ‹,вЂ¦,ANвЂ‹ denoting the given array.
QQQ lines follow. The iii-th line contains two space-separated integers LiL_{i}LiвЂ‹ and RiR_{i}RiвЂ‹ denoting the iii-th query.


Output Format
For each query, output the value SSS for the subarray on a single line.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
For the first query, there is only one sequence of operations that uses 222 operations:

Choose i=2i = 2i=2 and p=11p = 11p=11, assign A2Г—11=77A_2 \times 11 = 77A2вЂ‹Г—11=77 to A2A_2A2вЂ‹.
Choose i=3i = 3i=3 and p=7p = 7p=7, assign A3Г—7=77A_3 \times 7 = 77A3вЂ‹Г—7=77 to A3A_3A3вЂ‹.



We can prove that there aren't any sequence of operations that uses 111 operation, so the above sequence uses the least number of operations. The final SSS value is 777777.


For the second query, there are two sequences of operations that uses 222 operations. Those are:

Choose i=3i = 3i=3 and p=7p = 7p=7, assign A3Г—7=77A_3 \times 7 = 77A3вЂ‹Г—7=77 to A3A_3A3вЂ‹.
Choose i=4i = 4i=4 and p=7p = 7p=7, assign A4Г·7=11A_4 \div 7 = 11A4вЂ‹Г·7=11 to A4A_4A4вЂ‹.



Both of them are optimal in terms of number of operations. The first sequence of operations has the final value SSS to be 777777, and the second sequence of operations has the final value SSS to be 111111. Therefore, the answer to this query is 111111 (we need to minimize the final value SSS).
